headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings over 32px. Never use bold if the size is 5xl+, use 600 weight instead to maintain elegance.

body.usage_rules: Use tracking-normal and leading-relaxed for optimal readability.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with p-8 to p-12 standard paddings for main marketing sections. This provides an airy, elevated look.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 for product displays and marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.admin_dashboard: Use Control Room grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, gap-6. Dense layout utilizing full height.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Subtle borders (border-[#EBE3D5]), rounded-xl, flat background, ambient soft shadow on hover with -translate-y-1 transition.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_rules: Images max-h-[60vh] on mobile. Stack grid to single column.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Custom sections for Hero, About, Categories. Do not rely heavily on generic Shadcn card wrappers.
components_strategy.interactive_elements: Use heavily customized Shadcn components (Buttons, Dialogs, Select, Forms). Override default border radius to rounded-lg or rounded-xl.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Label. Soft borders and #FDFBF7 background for inputs.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky nav with bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 and backdrop-blur-md. Clean links, primary CTA 'Order Now'.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn Sidebar, Table, Tabs. Solid backgrounds (no glassmorphism) to keep it highly accessible and clean.

motion_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have distinct hover states (lighter/darker). Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a shadow-lg.
motion_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out' for cards, images, and buttons.
motion_interactions.page_load: Subtle fade-in and slight slide-up for main content sections.

icons_and_assets.style: Use stroke-width 1.5 to 2 depending on scale, matching the elegant feel of the typography.

hero_background.description: Busy bakery scene with customers selecting fresh pastries under warm lighting
hero_background.usage: Main hero background. CRITICAL: Use a bg-[#FDFBF7]/60 or gradient overlay to ensure text readability.

product_ube_cake.description: A vibrant purple yam cake elegantly presented on a decorative plate.
product_ube_cake.usage: Featured product image in the menu.

product_cinnamon_rolls.description: Delicious homemade cinnamon rolls placed on parchment paper
product_cinnamon_rolls.usage: Featured product image in the menu.

product_banana_muffins.description: Banana muffins/brown bread on white textile
product_banana_muffins.usage: Featured product image in the menu.

about_bread_loaf.description: Crispy golden-brown artisan bread loaves fresh from the oven
about_bread_loaf.usage: About us section or craftsmanship highlight.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against the #FDFBF7 background has sufficient contrast. Use #3E2723 for primary text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='order-now-button', data-testid='gcash-upload-input', data-testid='track-order-button'.

feature_implementation_notes.order_tracking: Implement a simple form on the frontend where users enter order number, and display a vertical timeline component showing statuses (e.g., Pending, Baking, Ready for Pickup/Delivery, Completed).
feature_implementation_notes.gcash_payment: Provide a clean file upload area for GCash QR receipt if the user selects GCash in the payment radio group.
feature_implementation_notes.fb_messenger: Add a floating widget or a prominent button in the footer linking to the FB Messenger URL.
feature_implementation_notes.admin_dashboard: Needs protected routes. Admin should have tables with status dropdowns (using Shadcn Select) to quickly change order statuses.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary fonts via Google Fonts in index.css (Playfair Display, Manrope).
Install lucide-react if not present, though it is usually default.
Initialize Shadcn UI and add components: button, card, input, form, select, table, tabs, dialog, radio-group.
Configure Tailwind with the custom colors provided in this JSON.
Strictly follow the 'Organic & Earthy' theme. Avoid sharp neons, deep blacks, or cold grays.
Ensure all data-testids are added to interactive elements.
